system.description:
Analyze the battlefield. Instruct your soldiers. Tonight we march towards victory.

LEVEL 3

Strategic Instructions. Action: Relay an Instruction to an ally that can hear you, granting them certain effects. You can have 1 Instruction active (new Instructions replace active ones). Instructions last until the end of combat or they are replaced. Known Instructions:

  • Get Back In Line! +2 speed.
  • Slow Their Advance! Attacks apply Slowed.
  • Get Their Attention! Attacks Taunt the target until the end of their next turn.

LEVEL 7

Stay in the Fight. When relaying an Instruction to an ally, they gain KEY Temp HP.

New Orders. You can now have up to 2 Instructions active. Learn a new Instruction:

  • Disrupt Their Formation! Attacks Push 2 on hit.

LEVEL 11

New Orders (2). You can now have up to 3 Instructions active. Learn a new Instruction:

  • Breach Their Defenses! Adjacent allies gain advantage on attacks.

LEVEL 15

Surprise Assault. (1/encounter) Reaction: Grant all allies with Instructions an extra action.
